source_file: Altumint-TM001(02) Flashing Light Video Monitor Assembly Instructions-240326-194800.pdf

text_blocks.text: Install 1FT CAT5 cable between PoE Data IN port and Netgear switch.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Install web relay to hex standoffs on top-right of plate using four 4-40 socket head cap screws.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Complete power wiring for web relay by installing second barrel jack connector.
text_blocks.label: list_item

figures.caption: Full page screenshot — page 9 of Altumint-TM001(02) Flashing Light Video Monitor Assembly Instructions-240326-194800.pdf
figures.label: page_screenshot

full_text: Install 1FT CAT5 cable between PoE Data IN port and Netgear switch. Install web relay to hex standoffs on top-right of plate using four 4-40 socket head cap screws. Complete power wiring for web relay by installing second barrel jack connector.
